description: Configure GPredict with three international ground stations and three dedicated tracking modules for coordinated multi-site operations. Create ground stations named 'Svalbard' (78.2306 N, 15.3894 E, 458 m), 'Singapore' (1.3521 N, 103.8198 E, 15 m), and 'PuntaArenas' (53.1638 S, 70.9171 W, 37 m). Create and assign tracking modules so that 'Arctic_Tracking' is assigned to Svalbard, 'Equatorial_Tracking' to Singapore, and 'Southern_Tracking' to PuntaArenas. Each module must track four satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Configure the application to display UTC time. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

natural_language.prompt: I need to set up GPredict for our global satellite data relay network. Please create three new ground stations: Svalbard at 78.2306 N, 15.3894 E (458m altitude); Singapore at 1.3521 N, 103.8198 E (15m altitude); and PuntaArenas at 53.1638 S, 70.9171 W (37m altitude). Then, create three separate tracking modules named Arctic_Tracking, Equatorial_Tracking, and Southern_Tracking. This is the critical part: you must assign the Arctic_Tracking module to the Svalbard ground station, Equatorial_Tracking to Singapore, and Southern_Tracking to PuntaArenas. Finally, add the same four satellites to all three modules: ISS ZARYA (25544), CSS TIANHE (48274), NOAA 19 (33591), and SUOMI NPP (37849). Oh, and set the software to show UTC time.
